mapper.sql: id, template_id, template_name, template_code, template_type, template_content, paper_size, orientation, margin_top, margin_bottom, margin_left, margin_right, watermark_enabled, watermark_text, watermark_opacity, watermark_rotation, watermark_font_size, watermark_color, header_enabled, header_content, footer_enabled, footer_content, background_image_url, background_fixed, is_default, status, tenant_id, created_at, updated_at, created_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM print_template WHERE template_code = #{templateCode} AND (tenant_id = #{tenantId} OR tenant_id = 0) LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM print_template WHERE (template_id = #{templateId} OR template_id = 0) AND (tenant_id = #{tenantId} OR tenant_id = 0) AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT FROM print_template WHERE (tenant_id = #{tenantId} OR tenant_id = 0) AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT FROM print_template WHERE is_default = 1 AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND (template_id = #{templateId} OR template_id = 0) AND (tenant_id = #{tenantId} OR tenant_id = 0) ORDER BY tenant_id DESC, template_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO print_template ( template_id, template_name, template_code, template_type, template_content, paper_size, orientation, margin_top, margin_bottom, margin_left, margin_right, watermark_enabled, watermark_text, watermark_opacity, watermark_rotation, watermark_font_size, watermark_color, header_enabled, header_content, footer_enabled, footer_content, background_image_url, background_fixed, is_default, status, tenant_id, created_by ) VALUES ( #{templateId}, #{templateName}, #{templateCode}, #{templateType}, #{templateContent}, #{paperSize}, #{orientation}, #{marginTop}, #{marginBottom}, #{marginLeft}, #{marginRight}, #{watermarkEnabled}, #{watermarkText}, #{watermarkOpacity}, #{watermarkRotation}, #{watermarkFontSize}, #{watermarkColor}, #{headerEnabled}, #{headerContent}, #{footerEnabled}, #{footerContent}, #{backgroundImageUrl}, #{backgroundFixed}, #{isDefault}, #{status}, #{tenantId}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE print_template SET template_name = #{templateName}, template_code = #{templateCode}, template_type = #{templateType}, template_content = #{templateContent}, paper_size = #{paperSize}, orientation = #{orientation}, margin_top = #{marginTop}, margin_bottom = #{marginBottom}, margin_left = #{marginLeft}, margin_right = #{marginRight}, watermark_enabled = #{watermarkEnabled}, watermark_text = #{watermarkText}, watermark_opacity = #{watermarkOpacity}, watermark_rotation = #{watermarkRotation}, watermark_font_size = #{watermarkFontSize}, watermark_color = #{watermarkColor}, header_enabled = #{headerEnabled}, header_content = #{headerContent}, footer_enabled = #{footerEnabled}, footer_content = #{footerContent}, background_image_url = #{backgroundImageUrl}, background_fixed = #{backgroundFixed}, is_default = #{isDefault}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
